scout.notEnoughMatches: Not enough matches to analyze patterns.
scout.deathsCaption: Death map (slider — deaths up to the selected minute)
scout.movementCaption: Movement route by match (slider — up to the minute)
scout.jungleRoutesCaption: Jungle routes by match (click a match — show only it)
scout.ownStart: Started in own jungle in {{own}}% of games · invade/enemy start in {{enemy}}%.
scout.notEnoughRoute: Not enough data for a route.
scout.noMastery: No mastery on {{champion}} — not playing their main.
scout.title: Scout — active game recon
scout.intro: Enter the Riot ID of any player currently in a match — the app will show both teams, their champions, ranks and winrates. Positions are detected automatically (Smite = jungle + champion role); if something's off, <1>drag</1> the player card onto the right lane. Clicking a player opens their recent games.
scout.scoutMyGameTitle: Takes your account from the running League client (LCU) — no need to enter a Riot ID
scout.invalidRiotId: Enter a Riot ID in the Name#TAG format (e.g. Player#RU1).
scout.noApiKey: Enter your Riot API key in Settings and save.
